title: Lumen Wild
description: Adds New Plants to the Game and Allows Crafting the Sacred Tool (Essence of Nature) with Them
body:
More than 1 plant per biome!

New Essence of Nature
(will give you some features)

And a total of 8 new plants, each unique and each with its own characteristics 

A Minecraft mod that adds one or more unique plants to each biome with a focus on decoration and diversity. The mod offers different plants that complement the atmosphere of each biome while enhancing the visual richness of the game. From forests to deserts, swamps to icy tundra, you will encounter different plants in each environment, making your world more vibrant and alive.

-Glimmerbloom (Forest)

A glowing plant found in the forest biome.
It drops 1 seed.

-Frostboom (Snowy Tundra)

A glowing plant found in cold, icy climates.
It drops 1 snowball.

-Dunebloom (Desert)

A glowing, poisonous plant that grows in desert dunes. They are skilled hunters.
Leaves 1 rotten flesh.

-Verdantbloom (Forest)

A glowing plant species found in the forest biome. There are two species: male and female.
1 drops bone meal.

Male Verdants apply a short-lived healing effect to creatures they touch.
Female Verdants apply a short-lived damage effect.
They can be found in bamboo forests and jungles, but they are difficult to distinguish. Males are darker in color while females are lighter.

-Bogbloom (Swamp)

A plant that emits little light in swamp biomes.
1 rope drops.

-Night Flower (Dark Forest)

Found in dark forests, this plant emits a faint glow.
It drops 1 stick.

-Shadow Flower (Cave)

A glowing, fragile plant found in dark caves. It breaks when stepped on.
It will not drop any objects.

-Glade Flower (Taiga)

Elegant flowers that bloom in the shade of trees, emitting a soft light.
1 green dye drops.

-Essence of Nature

A mysterious orb is said to have the power of all nature!
In inventory: luck
On top of soil/grass blocks: Power 2 + Speed 2
on sand: fire resistance + resistance 2
on snow: slow fall 2 + regeneration 2
on top of the moss block: Night vision + saturation
on the stone: glare + bad luck
on the nether stone: slowness 2
on the end stone: slowness 2

when right-clicked:
You are blessed by nature gives you 5 minutes of Speed 3 + saturation 3
but the power of nature is gone.

You only need Essence of Nature in your inventory to benefit from the features

+Pictures

+Achievements

+Potion

+Trade

Download for More!

Detail: https://www.youtube.com/@Munur35
